title: Fun at St Fanny's
writer: Anthony Verney, Peter Noble, Denis Waldock
actors: Fred Emney, Cardew Robinson, Miriam Karlin
plot: 25 year old Cardew is still at school, run by a large headmaster Who lives and bets off the income that comes from Cardew s uncle will. Of course, the headmaster and the matron don't let Cardew leave school.
